question: Do you have a business policy document?

recommandations.recommandation: A business plan will help keep your company financially healthy.
Consider identifying clear goals for your business.

question: Are your criteria based on any international guidelines?

recommandations.recommandation: Following national/international guidelines helps develop healthier products.

question: If yes, how are your products analyzed?

recommandations.recommandation: Chemical analysis in analytical laboratories is the preferred method.

question: Is healthiness a factor in defining the price of a product?

propositions.proposition: Please explain how your company engages with the community

recommandations.recommandation: We recommend that you seek input on nutrition, food technology, quality, and safety from experts in order to ensure your products are nutritious, of high quality, and safe for consumption. This will help your company establish long-term nutritional and financial value
We recommend you consider extending the range of nutrition, food technology, quality, and safety experts you work with.
We recommend you consider extending the range of nutrition, food technology, quality, and safety experts you work with.
Consider extending the range of experts you work with, to improve the nutritional quality of your products and ensure food quality and safety.
Consider extending the range of experts you work with, to improve the nutritional quality of your products and ensure food quality and safety.
Working with the relevant experts helps ensure that your products are nutritious, of high quality, and safe for consumption.
